name: card-demo
visual_summary: Card-Demo is a customizable card component with various styles and layouts. It is suitable for displaying information in a concise and visually appealing manner, making it ideal for dashboard widgets, product showcases, or profile summaries.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: card-demo
Description: Card-Demo is a customizable card component with various styles and layouts. It is suitable for displaying information in a concise and visually appealing manner, making it ideal for dashboard widgets, product showcases, or profile summaries.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal, flat
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: UI component, card, interactive

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
